title: Web Application Developer
description:
We are expanding our team of talented Web Based Application developers and are on the lookout for dynamic individuals who are keen in developing Enterprise based web applications. The applying candidates should be able to demonstrate creativity in deriving solutions for different project/scenarios as well as being proficient in software development lifecycles and willing to work as a team player. Selected candidates can look forward to attractive income, potential and rewarding career prospects plus growth opportunities.

The challenge

  • Analyze requirements and develop, maintain and enhance custom developed application software and scripts to meet the requirements;
  • Develop application software or scripts as and when required;
  • Assist and/or Represent the Company in the technical aspect of your software development;
  • Conduct code review and testing;
  • Prepare documentation e.g. Design specifications, User Acceptance Test document and participate in reviews;
  • Software design and optimization;
  • Development of custom software or scripts to meet the new functionalities required by the business;
  • Deliver projects via installation on the company’s Hosting Servers or Client’s Hosting Environment;
  • Develop custom built applications using .NET Framework, ASP.NET Core, Microsoft Visual Studio Development Environment, Relational Database Management System.

Requirements

  • Must have minimum 3 years’ experience in development using .NET.
  • More experienced candidates will be considered for senior positions.
  • Experience in developing enterprise-level systems.
  • Good programming and analytical skills.
  • Good written and oral communication skills.
  • Working knowledge of AGILE Methodologies.
  • Working knowledge in Unit Testing Tools preferably using NUnit or XUnit.
  • Working knowledge in documenting technical application specifications.
  • Proficient in Object-Oriented Programming and Entity Framework.
  • Proficient in architecting, developing and maintaining SQL databases.
  • Working experience in implementing solutions on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, Google Cloud andCI/CD practices.
  • Working experience in developing Web Services APIs.
  • Working experience in frontend languages like HTML, CSS, Javascript.

Experience in the following will be advantageous:

  • Frontend framework/libraries like React.JS, Node.JS, Vue.JS
  • Containerization and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes
  • PowerShell and similar scripting tools
  • Microsoft SharePoint Server and SharePoint Online.
  • Content Management Systems Platforms such as Sitefinity, DirectUs
  • Low Code Platforms such as Power Platform, OutSystems

A competitive remuneration package based on experience, will be offered to selected candidates

postedCompany.description:
Since 2007, Simple Solution Systems Pte Ltd (“SIMSYS”) has been a leading IT solution and service provider based in Singapore. Our robust Enterprise Software Solutions and systems are setup in a wide range of environments from Small Business Systems to Enterprise Class N-Tier Architecture Environments. Our emphasis is in the quality of the design solutions that meet the most stringent performance and security requirements.

At SIMSYS we are at the forefront of Enterprise Application Development. Our clientele are mainly from the Government Sector as well as large Multi National Corporations and Financial institutions who have the highest demand in high performance Enterprise Applications. Underpinning everything we do, is the firm belief that technology should positively impact the lives of people. We work hand in hand with our clients to improve business efficiency, resiliency and removing technology roadblocks.

We leverage on the latest technofixes to deliver our solutions from cloud native docker container applications to advanced DEVOPS delivery solutions to ensure high performance and security to our clients.

@SIMSYS, we believe that our people are our assets. Thus, we are committed to nurturing talents in developing creative and innovative solutions. We believe in creating an environment that fosters strong team spirit and respects individuality and autonomy.

If you are passionate about new cloud based web & mobile technologies and dynamic new ways improving the IT landscape, we welcome you to be part of our growing team!
postedCompany.name: SIMPLE SOLUTION SYSTEMS PTE. LTD.
